title: [ImportVerilog] Implicit return variable assignment treated as captured value

features.name: implicit return variable assignment in function
features.description: Code should include a function where the return value is assigned using the function name itself rather than a declared return variable

features.name: nested function calls with implicit return variables
features.description: Code should include a function calling another function where both use implicit return variable assignment by function name

features.name: automatic function with input and implicit return
features.description: Code should include an automatic function with input parameter and implicit return variable assigned via function name
